summary: Loads point-cloud files from disk as POP geometry. Supports .obj, .ply, .fits, .exr, .xyz, .pts, .csv, .txt formats with their associated attributes.

key_params.name: file
key_params.note: Path to the point cloud file

key_params.name: format
key_params.note: Auto-detect or force a specific reader

key_params.name: scale
key_params.note: Uniform scale applied to incoming points

key_params.name: delayed
key_params.note: Defer the read off the cooking thread for large files

common_gotchas: Very large clouds (millions of points) can stall cooks — use the delayed toggle, or downsample upstream.
.csv/.txt formats need column ordering hints — make sure header or column-mapping params match the file.
